# Source: Metabolism Curriculum Design Session

> Strategic framing session for the metabolism reels batch curriculum.

## Capture

Discussed the eight-module sequence: insulin signaling, mitochondrial biogenesis, fasting adaptations, ketogenesis vs gluconeogenesis, thermogenesis, oxidative stress, the four healing quadrants, and metabolic flexibility as the integrating frame. Key call: lead with insulin signaling because it's the most leverage-per-minute for the median viewer.
